question: Private rents should be capped as a percentage of tenant income.
Academic selection at age 11 should be abolished.
Irish should have equal legal status to English in NI.
NI should commit to net zero by 2035, not 2050.
Private companies should be removed from delivering NHS services.
A standalone Hate Crime Bill should be passed without delay.
Corporation tax in NI should be cut below the UK rate.
Welfare cuts should be mitigated locally regardless of cost.
Cross-border cooperation with Ireland should be deepened.
Legacy cases from the Troubles should be reopened, not closed.
